title: task
description: edhoc.rs tests - Only unit tests exist (test_initiator_creation, test_responder_creation, test_message_1_creation). No test exercises a full initiator<->responder handshake, which would have caught the context_2 mismatch bug. Need a test that: creates initiator and responder, exchanges message_1/message_2/message_3, and verifies both can export_oscore() successfully with matching keys.
close_reason: Fixed: Added test_full_handshake integration test. The test uncovered and fixed several bugs: (1) process_message_1 minimum length check was off-by-one (38 vs 37), (2) responder MAC_2 context was missing ID_CRED_R (only had CRED_R), (3) msg2 buffer was 128 bytes but needs 160, (4) th_3_input buffer was 128 bytes but needs 192.
